request: How well are our suppliers performing?
search_document:
User Request: How well are our suppliers performing?

Dashboard Components:
Title: Supplier Performance Overview
Type: chart
Description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
Title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
Title: Total Supplier Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Aggregate revenue from all suppliers
Title: Supplier Order Fulfillment Rate
Type: chart
Description: Percentage of orders fulfilled by suppliers on time
Title: Supplier Product Availability
Type: chart
Description: Overview of product availability from suppliers

sql_queries.title: Supplier Performance Overview
sql_queries.description: Visual representation of supplier performance metrics
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", SUM(od."Quantity" * od."UnitPrice" * (1 - od."Discount")) AS "TotalRevenue" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" GROUP BY s."CompanyName"

sql_queries.title: Top Suppliers by Revenue
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers ranked by total revenue generated
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", SUM(od."Quantity" * od."UnitPrice" * (1 - od."Discount")) AS "TotalRevenue" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" GROUP BY s."CompanyName" ORDER BY "TotalRevenue" DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Supplier Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od."Quantity" * od."UnitPrice" * (1 - od."Discount")) AS "TotalRevenue" FROM "Order Details" od

sql_queries.title: Supplier Order Fulfillment Rate
sql_queries.description: Percentage of orders fulfilled by suppliers on time
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", COUNT(o."OrderID") AS "TotalOrders", SUM(CASE WHEN o."ShippedDate" <= o."RequiredDate" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "OnTimeOrders", (SUM(CASE WHEN o."ShippedDate" <= o."RequiredDate" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(o."OrderID")) * 100 AS "FulfillmentRate" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID" JOIN "Order Details" od ON p."ProductID" = od."ProductID" JOIN "Orders" o ON od."OrderID" = o."OrderID" GROUP BY s."CompanyName"

sql_queries.title: Supplier Product Availability
sql_queries.description: Overview of product availability from suppliers
sql_queries.sql: SELECT s."CompanyName", p."ProductName", p."UnitsInStock", p."UnitsOnOrder" FROM "Suppliers" s JOIN "Products" p ON s."SupplierID" = p."SupplierID"
